channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole and smaller potholes, 5th July
item.description:
There is a large pothole and smaller potholes on Eastern way A2016 dual carriageway towards theamsmead. This has been here for a few months and is a danger to vehicles as it is a 50mph road. Please repair urgently. *See image with marked area*

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ampleforth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and houshold rubbish dumped, 5th July
item.description:
Furniture and rubbish dumped on the pavement- filthy mattress and people then dumping more rubbish when passing by

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp hump, 5th July
item.description:
There is a sharp hump on Eastern way dual carriageway from Belvedere going towards theamsmead just after the slip road. This has been here for years, please smooth/repair. *See image with marked area*

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 next to Elmcourt Road junction, 5th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 next to Elmcourt Road junction – south side – at the side of Orford Court (which is on Elmcourt Road) are a yellow plastic grit bin and next to it a green plastic road sweeper’s bag bin. Both of these bins are tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin and picture. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4379721,-0.1056337,3a,43y,85.78h,89.92t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1stn-TPLDCm4xNfTl5DXap4w!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D0.08461881835394536%26panoid%3Dtn-TPLDCm4xNfTl5DXap4w%26yaw%3D85.78012295652482!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDYyOS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings faded, 5th July
item.description:
Road markings faded/missing along the whole of Eastern way dual carriageway towards theamsead. Please repaint
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of rubbish left on pavement, 5th July
item.description:
Box of rubbish has been left on the pavement. It has been there for approximately 4 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewis Road, Welling, Greater London
